description: 学术严谨 - 论文格式 + 衬线正字,章节编号式层级,适合研究 / 论述 / 严肃长文

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Times New Roman', 'Songti SC', serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.95; letter-spacing: 0.3px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #ffffff;
styles.h1: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: center; margin: 40px 0 28px; padding: 0 0 16px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #1a1a1a; letter-spacing: 1px; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 40px 0 16px; padding: 0; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.h3: font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 30px 0 12px; padding: 0; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-style: italic;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 2em; text-align: justify; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 2.0;
styles.blockquote: margin: 26px 20px; padding: 2px 18px; background: transparent; border-left: 3px solid #1a1a1a; color: #3a3a3a; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.9; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-style: italic;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 0; margin: 28px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #d0d0d0;
styles.strong: color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 3px;
styles.code_inline: background: #f2f2f2; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8; font-style: italic;
styles.code_block: background: #f7f7f7; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; font-style: italic; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: #1a1a1a; margin: 42px 0; opacity: 0.3;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 13.5px; border-top: 1.5px solid #1a1a1a; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #1a1a1a; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: transparent; color: #1a1a1a; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1a1a; font-style: italic; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #5a5a5a; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #1a1a1a; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 14px; margin: 42px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.35; font-style: italic; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

list_style.label: A · 斜体小罗马
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; font-size: 15px; margin-right: 8px; min-width: 22px; font-family: 'Georgia','Times New Roman',serif;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; margin-right: 10px; font-family: 'Georgia',serif;
